name: Wings of Prey: Special Edition
short_description: Wings of Prey is based around large-scale aerial combat in World War II. Players can participate in some of the most famous battles piloting fighters, attack aircraft and bombers across a range of thrilling missions.
detailed_description:
Special Edition includes original Wings of Prey game and Wings of Luftwaffe add-on.

Wings of Prey is based around large-scale aerial combat in World War II. Players can participate in some of the most famous battles piloting fighters, attack aircraft and bombers across a range of thrilling missions. There are six theatres of war to engage in: The Battle of Britain, Stalingrad, the Ardennes, Berlin, Sicily and Korsun' representing some of the main airborne battles from World War II in Europe. Wings of Prey also boasts a sophisticated damage effects engine as well as advanced environmental visuals enriching the game play. It also features hundreds of aircraft taking part in air battles.

Key Features:

  • Authentic World War atmosphere: Cutting edge technologies with highly detailed visuals bring the epic battles to life;

  • Engage in more than 50 missions from famous historical battles over Eastern and Western Europe;

  • Historically accurate aircraft: Experience over 40 models including fighters, attack aircraft and bombers. Learn to master a Spitfire, the Mustang, Messerschmitts and many more;

  • Flexible difficulty level system: from arcade to realistic simulation;

  • Support of 6-DOF TrackIR, TripleHead2Go, Saitek and Thrustmaster joysticks, mouse and voice headsets;

  • Realistic sound effects and an original musical score from Jeremy Soule.

Note! Multiplayer for Wings of Prey is no longer supported!

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, French*, German*, Italian*, Spanish - Spain*, Czech, Polish
*languages with full audio support
